violations.text: A container was observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the hoods have an accumulation of dust, dirt, grease, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2026

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (bottled drinks) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025

Containers were observed in the hand-washing sink in the ware washing area. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2025

Various sauces were observed held at 44-50 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2025

Sriracha Aioli and buttermilk aioli which was prepared on site, date marked 8/17 & 8/20 was observed held beyond the 7 days. Food items exceeding the 7 days shall be discarded. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2025
Low boy located in the front area was not in good repair, ambient observed at 44F. PIC took unit out of service at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of: 1) Vents (dust, black residue) 2) Blender (food residue) New Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2024

The ceiling in the front prep area is in poor repair. Leak observed. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Establishment must repair leak. Please email proof that leak has been fixed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2024

The floors in the walk-in cooler and under and behind equipment have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2024
